title: Copper Age Backport
description: A Minecraft mod that brings the complete Copper Age experience to older Minecraft versions.
body:
# Copper Age Backport
*(formerly Copper Golem Legacy)*

A Minecraft mod that brings the complete Copper Age experience to older Minecraft versions. Starting with the beloved Copper Golem from the Minecraft Live 2021 mob vote, this mod adds copper-related blocks, items, and mechanics, including Copper Chests, Buttons, Statues, and the full oxidation system.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/a1llHwl4/images/1b762a374311caff7a2a1ee8a996592ed61dd3cf.png)

# Features

### Minecraft Namespace
All vanilla backport features use the `minecraft:` namespace (e.g., `minecraft:copper_chests`) to ensure seamless world migration when updating to Minecraft 1.21.10+. Mod-exclusive features like Copper Buttons remain under `copperagebackport:`.

### Copper Golem
- Summoned by placing a carved pumpkin on a copper block  
- Transports items between Copper Chests  
- Randomly presses nearby Copper Buttons  
- Four oxidation stages  
- Iron Golems can now offer flowers to Copper Golems
- Configurable oxidation time  
- Configurable transport stack size
- and more

### Wooden Shelves
- Wooden Shelves (12 wood variants, up to 3 items, redstone output)

### End Flash Effect
- Periodic sky flashes that illuminate the End dimension with a purple tint
- Doesn’t work with shaders because End Flash doesn’t exist in 1.20.1; it was only added in 1.21.4.
- Iris/OptiFine only provide the endFlashIntensity uniform on 1.21.4+

### Copper Storage & Redstone
- Copper Chests with oxidation, waxing, and double chest support  

### Copper Blocks & Decoration
- Copper Buttons (8 variants, won't oxidize while pressed, exclusive to mod)
- Copper Statues (4 poses, comparator output 1-4, reversible to golems)  
- Copper Torch with custom flame particles + wall variant (Amendments compatible)  
- Copper Lantern (8 variants, light level 15, hanging & standing, Amendments compatible)  
- Copper Chain (8 variants, rotatable, waterloggable, ConnectibleChains compatible)  
- Copper Bars (8 variants, connect to blocks, waterloggable)
- Lightning Rods (7 new weathering variants, config to disable oxidation, Friends and Foes conversion recipes)
- Exclusive to 1.20.1
  - Copper Trapdoor (8 variants, hand-openable like wooden trapdoors)
  - Copper Door (8 variants, synchronized oxidation, both halves wax/scrape together)
  - Chiseled Copper (8 variants, crafting & stonecutting recipes)
  - Copper Grate (8 variants, transparent, waterloggable, mobs can't spawn on it)
  - Copper Bulb (8 variants, T-flip-flop redstone, light levels 15/12/8/4 by oxidation)
  
### Copper Gear
- Copper Tools & Weapons (Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, Hoe, Sword – stone–iron tier)  
- Copper Armor (Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots – between chainmail & iron)  
- Copper Horse Armor (protection 4, found in various loot chests)
    
### Compatibility & Extras
- FastChest support (Fabric & Forge)  
- Amendments
- Friends and Foes
- SophisticatedStorage support (NeoForge & Forge)
- IronChests support (NeoForge & Forge)
- ConnectibleChains support (Fabric & Forge)
- Quark support (Forge only)
- PaleGardenBackport: Pale Oak Shelf + crafting recipes 
- VanillaBackport support: Pale Oak Shelf + crafting recipes  
- Over 50 custom sounds for entities, blocks, and interactions

### Localizaion
If you want to help translate this mod into or other languages, you can contribute on [Crowdin](https://crowdin.com/project/copper-golem-legacy).
  
## Links & Support

- [GitHub](https://github.com/Smallinger/Copper-Golem-Legacy) – Source code & issue tracker  
- [Discord](https://discord.gg/hGrWUW9vSb) – Join the community & chat with the developer  
- [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/smallinger) – Support development
